name: TestGetWaitEventMsgData
title: TestGetWaitEventMsgData
description: If a message event is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the message content can be called up with the first function.The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: Message variable that should be filled in with this function.
